title: Sadly Missed Grave Flower Pots Vase with Pink Flowers – Memorial Ornament with Heartfelt Inscription – Weatherproof Flowers Holder Pot – Vases Ornament for Graveside Remembrance
features: Memorial Flower Holder : A thoughtful tribute to a lost loved one, this graveside vase features the inscription "Sadly Missed, Deep in our hearts you'll aways stay, Loved & missed every day"
Durable Weatherproof Resin : Made from sturdy, weather-resistant resin, this grave ornament is designed to last in all seasons
Removable Flower Insert : Includes a removable pot insert, making it easy to arrange and replace fresh or artificial flowers
Elegant Design : With a white finish and black speckled detailing, this memorial vase features a delicate pink flower design with diamantes for a timeless and respectful look
Dimensions : Measuring H15cm x W12cm x D12cm (with pot), this grave flower pot is the ideal size for placing beside a memorial headstone or resting area
description: Honour the memory of a loved one with the Sadly Missed Grave Flower Pot Vase, a beautiful memorial ornament designed to provide a lasting tribute. Featuring the heartfelt inscription : "Sadly Missed – Deep in our hearts you'll always stay, loved & missed every day." Crafted from durable, weatherproof resin, this graveside flower vase is built to endure the elements, ensuring a long-lasting display of love and remembrance. Its white finish with black speckles and delicate pink flower design with diamantes creating a refined and timeless design. The removable flower holder insert allows for easy arrangement of fresh or artificial flowers, making it simple to personalise the tribute. With dimensions of H15cm x W12cm x D12cm, this memorial flower pot is a perfect addition to a grave, headstone, or memorial site. A thoughtful and meaningful graveside decoration, this memorial flower holder offers a lasting way to keep cherished memories close.
